summary: LG Uplus D-34 긴급 갱신, TVING D-65 Stage5 진행중, CJ Olive Young $450K Upsell Proposal, Starbucks 갱신 Closed Won, SPC Land Closed Won.
summary_en: LG Uplus D-34 urgent renewal, TVING D-65 at Stage 5, CJ Olive Young $450K Upsell Proposal, Starbucks renewal Closed Won, SPC Land Closed Won.

accounts.notes_summary: 갱신+수직확장 딜 Stage5 진행중. 목표 ARR $450K (현재 $240K 대비 +$210K Upsell). D-126.
accounts.notes_summary_en: Renewal+Expand deal at Stage 5. Target ARR $450K (+$210K upsell from $240K). D-126.
accounts.next_action: Stage6 클로징 준비 - 계약서 초안 협의
accounts.next_action_en: Prepare Stage 6 close - negotiate contract draft
accounts.strategy: 한국 최대 뷰티 플랫폼의 데이터 드리븐 성장 파트너. $450K Upsell은 전사 디지털 플랫폼화의 시작점. G&S 번들로 AI 개인화 추천 가능성 제시.
accounts.strategy_en: Data-driven growth partner for Korea's largest beauty platform. $450K upsell marks start of enterprise digitalization. Present G&S bundle for AI personalization.

activity_history.summary: Olive Young 데이터팀 QBR. G&S 번들 제안 발표. 긍정적 반응.
activity_history.summary_en: Olive Young data team QBR. Presented G&S bundle proposal. Positive response.

activity_history.summary: $450K Upsell 제안서 공식 발송. 의사결정자 검토 중.
activity_history.summary_en: Officially sent $450K upsell proposal. Decision maker reviewing.

accounts.notes_summary: 갱신+확장 $420K Stage5. 계약 만료 D-65. 딜 클로징 속도가 만료일보다 늦어질 위험.
accounts.notes_summary_en: Renewal+Expand $420K at Stage 5. Contract expires D-65. Risk of deal close lagging behind expiry.
accounts.next_action: 클로징 가속화 - Stage6 조건 협의 및 EB 컨펌 요청
accounts.next_action_en: Accelerate close - negotiate Stage 6 terms and request EB confirmation
accounts.strategy: OTT 업계 데이터 분석 리더십 포지셔닝. D-65 갱신 타이밍에 $420K Upsell 클로징이 핵심. 갱신 성공 시 CJ 그룹 전체 레퍼런스로 확장.
accounts.strategy_en: Position as OTT data analytics leader. Close $420K upsell at D-65 renewal. Win enables CJ Group-wide reference.

activity_history.summary: 갱신 조건 관련 법무팀 검토 요청 메일 수신. 계약서 초안 첨부.
activity_history.summary_en: Received email from legal team requesting review of renewal terms. Contract draft attached.

activity_history.summary: TVING CPO와 갱신 미팅. $420K 조건 구두 합의. 공식 계약서 검토 중.
activity_history.summary_en: Renewal meeting with TVING CPO. Verbal agreement on $420K terms. Official contract under review.

activity_history.summary: CSM Jihee로부터 사용률 리포트 공유. MAU 전월 대비 12% 증가.
activity_history.summary_en: CSM Jihee shared usage report. MAU up 12% month-over-month.

accounts.notes_summary: 2026-01 갱신 Closed Won (3년 계약, $189.6K). 신규 Expand $204K Stage2 Qualification 시작.
accounts.notes_summary_en: Renewal Closed Won Jan 2026 (3-year, $189.6K). New Expand $204K now in Stage 2 Qualification.
accounts.next_action: Expand $204K 딜 Stage3 진입 - QBR 준비
accounts.next_action_en: Move Expand $204K to Stage 3 - prepare QBR on usage
accounts.strategy: 3년 장기 파트너십 기반 F&B 데이터 분석 표준 모델 구축. Expand $204K는 앱 고도화와 멤버십 리텐션 최적화 중심. 신세계 그룹 내 확장 레퍼런스로 활용.
accounts.strategy_en: Build F&B data analytics standard model on 3-year partnership. Expand $204K focuses on app enhancement and membership retention. Use as Shinsegae Group expansion reference.

accounts.next_action_en: Prepare Q4 renewal - review usage metrics
accounts.strategy: 신세계 그룹 내 Starbucks Korea 성공 사례 활용. 라이브커머스 특화 분석으로 차별화. Q4 갱신 전 사용률 기반 가치 입증.
accounts.strategy_en: Leverage Starbucks Korea success story within Shinsegae Group. Differentiate with live commerce-specific analytics. Prove value through usage metrics before Q4 renewal.

accounts.strategy: 롯데 그룹 이커머스/리테일 데이터 분석 허브. 롯데ON·롯데백화점 연계 Expand 논의로 그룹 확장. 2027 갱신 조기 전략 논의 시작.
accounts.strategy_en: Data analytics hub for Lotte Group e-commerce and retail. Drive group expansion via Lotte ON and Lotte Department Store. Initiate early 2027 renewal strategy discussion.

accounts.strategy: 롯데포인트 멤버십 행동 데이터 분석으로 Monetization Use Case 강화. 롯데 그룹 내 Amplitude 확산의 내부 챔피언 육성.
accounts.strategy_en: Strengthen Monetization use case through Lotte Points membership behavior analytics. Develop internal champions to spread Amplitude within Lotte Group.

accounts.next_action_en: Early discussion for 2027 contract + Expand proposal
accounts.strategy: GS25·GS수퍼 멀티채널 분석 플랫폼. 2027 갱신 조기 논의로 관계 강화 및 Expand 기회 선점. 리테일 데이터 드리븐 MD 전략 지원.
accounts.strategy_en: Multi-channel analytics platform for GS25 and GS Supermarket. Early 2027 renewal discussion strengthens relationship and secures Expand opportunity. Support data-driven retail MD strategy.

accounts.notes_summary: 갱신 딜 Stage2. 만료 D-34로 극도 긴급. infiniSTAR 갱신은 Closed Lost. Upsell 병행 제안 필요.
accounts.notes_summary_en: Renewal at Stage 2. Expires D-34, extremely urgent. infiniSTAR renewal was Closed Lost. Need parallel Upsell proposal.
accounts.next_action: 즉시 EB 연락 - 갱신 조건 확정 및 주문 제출
accounts.next_action_en: Contact EB immediately - confirm renewal terms and submit order
accounts.strategy: 통신사 전사 디지털 전환의 Amplitude 핵심 파트너. D-34 내 EB 컨펌 필수. infiniSTAR 이탈 교훈 반영하여 CTO 조직 내 전략적 벤더로 재포지셔닝.
accounts.strategy_en: Core Amplitude partner for telco-wide digital transformation. Must confirm EB within D-34. Reposition as strategic vendor in CTO org, applying infiniSTAR churn lessons.

accounts.notes_summary: 갱신 $27.9K Stage2 진행중. D-65. 사용률 BL 33% (매우 저조). 이탈 리스크 높음.
accounts.notes_summary_en: Renewal $27.9K at Stage 2. D-65. Usage BL 33% (very low). High churn risk.
accounts.next_action: 사용률 개선 CS 지원 + Stage3 진입 위해 가치 제시
accounts.next_action_en: CS support for usage improvement + demonstrate value for Stage 3
accounts.strategy: 패션 플랫폼 데이터 분석 내재화 지원. 사용률 33% 개선이 갱신 설득력의 핵심. CS팀 협력으로 Quick Win 사례 발굴 후 갱신 협상에 활용.
accounts.strategy_en: Support data analytics internalization for fashion platform. Improving 33% usage is key to renewal leverage. Find Quick Win cases with CS team to strengthen renewal negotiation.

accounts.next_action: 온보딩 지원 강화 - 활성 사용자 증대
accounts.next_action_en: Strengthen onboarding - increase active user count
accounts.strategy: 골프 예약·콘텐츠 플랫폼 데이터 분석 레퍼런스. 온보딩 활성화로 사용 깊이 증대. 스포츠 레저 버티컬 레퍼런스로 포지셔닝.
accounts.strategy_en: Data analytics reference for golf booking and content platform. Deepen usage through onboarding activation. Position as sports and leisure vertical reference.

accounts.strategy: KT 그룹 디지털 커머스 교두보. KT Corp 내 다른 사업부 Land 기회 탐색. 통신 그룹 내 Amplitude 확산 전략.
accounts.strategy_en: Digital commerce foothold within KT Group. Explore Land opportunities in other KT Corp divisions. Strategy to spread Amplitude within telecom group.

accounts.next_action: SK Adot / T world 신규 Land 추진
accounts.next_action_en: Pursue new Land with SK Adot / T world
accounts.strategy: SK 그룹 내 재유치 전략. IFLAND 이탈 교훈 반영하여 SK Adot·T world 신규 Land 추진. SK 그룹 디지털 서비스 전반으로 파이프라인 재구축.
accounts.strategy_en: Win-back strategy within SK Group. Apply IFLAND churn lessons to pursue new Land with SK Adot and T world. Rebuild pipeline across SK Group digital services.

accounts.next_action: 삼성 그룹사 확장 기회 탐색 (Cheil Worldwide 딜 연계)
accounts.next_action_en: Explore Samsung group expansion (leverage Cheil Worldwide deal)
accounts.strategy: 삼성 그룹 스타트업 투자사 랜드마크 고객. Cheil Worldwide 딜 연계로 삼성 그룹 전체 확장 교두보. Samsung Electronics Land 기회 탐색.
accounts.strategy_en: Landmark customer as Samsung Group's startup investment arm. Leverage Cheil Worldwide deal as Samsung Group expansion foothold. Explore Samsung Electronics Land opportunity.

accounts.deal_stage_en: Land Closed Won - Onboarding In Progress
accounts.notes_summary: 2026-01 Land $86K Closed Won 확정. 파리바게뜨·배스킨라빈스·쉐이크쉑 계열사 확장 잠재력 높음.
accounts.notes_summary_en: Land $86K Closed Won Jan 2026. High expansion potential to Paris Baguette, Baskin-Robbins, Shake Shack.
accounts.next_action_en: Initiate Expand discussion with affiliates (Paris Baguette, Baskin-Robbins)
accounts.strategy: 한국 F&B 대표 그룹 레퍼런스 확보. 파리바게뜨·배스킨라빈스 계열사 멀티 오르그 확장으로 그룹 전체 Amplitude 표준화. 일상 브랜드의 디지털 CX 혁신 파트너.
accounts.strategy_en: Secure Korea's top F&B group as reference. Multi-org expansion to Paris Baguette & Baskin-Robbins standardizes Amplitude across the group. Digital CX innovation partner for daily-life brands.

accounts.strategy: 한국 최대 IT 기업 레퍼런스 확보. 네이버 쇼핑·파이낸셜·웹툰 등 대규모 Land 기회. Amplitude를 네이버 성장 분석의 표준 툴로 포지셔닝.
accounts.strategy_en: Secure Korea's largest IT company as reference. Large-scale Land opportunity across Naver Shopping, Financial, and Webtoon. Position Amplitude as standard growth analytics tool for Naver.

accounts.next_action_en: Contact Hyundai Capital / Genesis app team
accounts.strategy: 현대차 글로벌 앱(제네시스, 현대캐피탈) 데이터 분석. 모빌리티 버티컬 레퍼런스 확보. 현대캐피탈 앱 담당자 접촉으로 Land 기회 구체화.
accounts.strategy_en: Data analytics for Hyundai global apps (Genesis, Hyundai Capital). Secure mobility vertical reference. Concretize Land opportunity through Hyundai Capital app team contact.

accounts.strategy: H.Point 멤버십 앱 기반 백화점 고객 행동 분석. 프리미엄 리테일 버티컬 레퍼런스. 현대백화점 그룹 디지털 전환 파트너로 포지셔닝.
accounts.strategy_en: Department store customer behavior analytics based on H.Point membership app. Premium retail vertical reference. Position as Hyundai Department Store Group digital transformation partner.

action_items.action: 갱신 즉시 착수 - D-34, EB 연락 및 주문 제출 목표
action_items.action_en: Immediate renewal action - D-34, contact EB and target order submission

action_items.action: 갱신 Stage5→6 클로징 가속 - D-65, EB 컨펌 및 계약 조건 확정
action_items.action_en: Accelerate Stage 5→6 close - D-65, confirm EB and finalize contract terms

action_items.action: 갱신 미팅 확정 - D-65, 사용률 33% 개선 방안 제시 필수
action_items.action_en: Confirm renewal meeting - D-65, must present plan to improve 33% usage rate
Push $450K Renewal+Expand from Stage 5 to Stage 6 close - D-126

action_items.action: 파리바게뜨·배스킨라빈스 계열사 Expand 논의 착수 (Land Closed Won 후속)
action_items.action_en: Initiate affiliate Expand discussion - Paris Baguette & Baskin-Robbins (post Land close)

action_items.action: Expand $204K Stage2→3 진입 - QBR 및 가치 제시 미팅 일정 확정
action_items.action_en: Move $204K Expand to Stage 3 - schedule QBR and value demonstration meeting

action_items.action: SK Adot 팀 재유치 미팅 - T world 신규 Land 기회 탐색
action_items.action_en: Win-back meeting with SK Adot - explore new Land with T world

strategy_summary: 【이번 주 최우선】LG Uplus D-34 즉각 갱신 착수. TVING·Nolbal D-65 클로징 가속. 【긍정 모멘텀】Starbucks 갱신 Closed Won + Expand $204K 신규 파이프라인, SPC Land $86K 확정 후 계열사 확장 논의 시작. CJ Olive Young $450K 대규모 Upsell Stage5 진행중. 관리 총 ARR ~$1.68M.
strategy_summary_en: 【Top Priority This Week】 LG Uplus D-34: immediate renewal required. TVING & Nolbal D-65: accelerate close. 【Positive Momentum】 Starbucks renewal Closed Won + new $204K Expand pipeline. SPC Land $86K confirmed → initiate affiliate expansion. CJ Olive Young $450K upsell at Stage 5. Total managed ARR ~$1.68M.

risks.risk: D-34 만료 - 갱신 Stage2에 불과, EB 미컨펌. infiniSTAR 갱신 Closed Lost 선례 있음
risks.risk_en: D-34 expiry - only at Stage 2, EB not confirmed. Precedent: infiniSTAR renewal Closed Lost

risks.risk: D-65 만료 - Stage5 딜 진행중이나 클로징이 만료일보다 늦어질 위험
risks.risk_en: D-65 expiry - Stage 5 deal in progress but at risk of close lagging behind contract expiry

risks.risk: D-65 만료 + 사용률 BL 33% (매우 저조) - 갱신 협상력 약화 및 이탈 리스크
risks.risk_en: D-65 expiry + usage BL 33% (very low) - weakens renewal leverage, high churn risk

risks.risk: 해지 고객 - SK Adot / T world 재유치 파이프라인 부재
risks.risk_en: Churned - no active win-back pipeline for SK Adot / T world
